payload.answer: I didn’t save this because today’s weather is temporary and not useful as durable memory.

entity_resolution.reason: The statement is transient weather information and has no durable personal memory value.

repair_options: If this was meant to capture a preference or routine, rephrase it as a durable fact, such as: “I prefer cloudy weather” or “Cloudy weather affects my mood.”
If this was meant as a dated journal note, include the date and ask to save it as a journal entry.
